summary: The Fed kept rates unchanged at 3.50%-3.75% on Mar. 18, lifted its 2026 inflation projections to 2.7% for both headline and core PCE, and held to a median year-end fed-funds path of 3.4%. title: Why Hyperliquid’s $48B oil-driven volume could signal a crypto reset
summary: As longs stack up on Hyperliquid, a potential unwind could define the next crypto market phase.

title: Quantum risk real, but not all crypto wallets equally vulnerable: Galaxy
summary: Galaxy Digital’s Will Owens says most crypto wallets aren’t exposed to quantum risks, with vulnerabilities limited to cases where public keys are revealed.

title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
summary: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI servers to China through shell companies.

title: Gemini sued over post-IPO strategy shift, declining stock price
summary: Crypto exchange Gemini is facing a proposed class-action lawsuit over what a complaint alleges is an “abrupt corporate pivot to a prediction-market-centric business model” after its IPO.

title: Appeals court denies Kalshi request to block Nevada enforcement action
summary: US gaming lawyer Daniel Wallach says a Nevada state court-issued restraining order against Kalshi appears imminent, preventing it from offering sports-related contracts.

title: Major gold trade group releases framework for tokenized gold
summary: The World Gold Council says it will develop a platform to connect physical gold to the systems used to issue and manage tokenized gold products.

title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
summary: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.

title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
summary: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.

title: Coinbase, Apex Group tokenize Bitcoin Yield Fund on Base
summary: Coinbase Asset Management’s Anthony Bassili says the Bitcoin Yield Fund’s tokenized share class checks “identity and eligibility at the token level” for compliance.

title: Execution quality is the missing metric in Bitcoin and Ethereum markets
summary: Crypto’s hidden trading costs demand the adoption of transaction cost analysis. Slippage, fees and fragmentation erode trust as crypto matures into institutional markets.

title: Bitcoin price tussle at $70K may hint that market bottom is not in
summary: Bitcoin slipped below $70K as futures selling rose and spot demand cooled, but a recurring setup on lower time frames points to a potential rebound.

summary: Retail investors became the main force behind gold-fund buying over the past six months, helping extend bullion’s rise even as some institutional money started to step back. title: SEC interpretation on crypto laws ‘a beginning, not an end,’ says Atkins
summary: The SEC chair signaled that the agency would defer to a market structure bill if passed by Congress, but needed a “bridge” to clarify crypto regulation.

title: BPI sounds alarm on 'backdoor' for hardware wallets in Kentucky crypto bill
summary: Provisions in the state legislation violate the core ethos and value proposition of Bitcoin as an asset that can be held in self-custody, the trade group said.

title: Coinbase tells users to follow ‘foolish’ steps scammers use to withdraw funds from wallets
summary: Coinbase is directing some Commerce users to a seed-phrase recovery flow ahead of a March 31 migration deadline. The issue sits inside Coinbase’s shutdown plan for legacy Commerce wallets. summary: Trading begins on MEXC Playnance’s G Coin has entered open-market trading, with the G Coin/USDT pair going live on MEXC after the project’s Token Generation Event on March 18. summary: For decades, the benchmark for US risk lived on US time. S&P 500 opened at 9:30 a.m. Eastern and closed at 4:00 p.m., with premarket whispers and after-hours fragments filling the gaps. title: $1 Billion Floods Back Into Crypto Funds, Snapping Five-Week $4B Bleed
summary: CoinShares reported $1 billion weekly turnaround, driven by Bitcoin buying and renewed investor appetite across major markets.
